subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'llah! If thou wouldst seek victory from the Kingdom of Abhá, become thou detached from this world and be vigilant and aware [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نصرالله اگر نصرت از ملکوت ابهی خواهی از دنیا بیزار شو و بیدار گرد هشیار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @education and the development of capacity
